text: 47 > A [ - s P T s o IV PP 2 oo ) Gogfi s K542 B & O 33N0 o005l 355 \E2 205 05 333305 o5t 05 &5 208 g Just as there is a share for men in what their parents and kinsfolk leave behind, so there is a share for women in what their parents and kinsfolk leave behind - be it little or much ' - a share ordained (by Allah).
